Disciplines

One platform for every major engineering estimate

Unified quantity takeoff, rate intelligence, and cost rollups across work packages.

01

Civil & Structural Works

Estimate excavation, concrete, steel structures, foundations, buildings, roads and drainage.

Capabilities

Everything an estimator needs, nothing they don't

Built for engineers who need speed without sacrificing accuracy or auditability.

BOQ

Drawing-to-BOQ Extraction

Upload civil foundation drawings and convert them into structured quantity takeoffs.

MTO

Pipe class-to-MTO Conversion

Enter pipe class, size, and quantity details. NirmaanQ automatically generates MTO lists.

RATE

NRL Rate Intelligence

Uses NRL SOR and historical project databases to support audit-ready estimates.

ROLL

Multi-Discipline Rollup

View civil, mechanical, piping, electrical and instrumentation costs in one project dashboard.

How It Works

From scope to defensible estimate in three steps

A clean path from raw project inputs to a cost report your team can defend.

1

Input

Upload drawings, excel BOQ, enter pipe class, size, and quantity details or describe your requirement in natural language.

2

Process

AI assists with MTO preparation, extracts quantities from drawings, and applies NRL SOR and SAP PO rates.

3

Output

Review interactive discipline-wise estimates with rate backup. Export to Excel or PDF.

?

FAQ

No. NirmaanQ is designed for domain engineers. You only need to understand your discipline and the related cross-discipline activities.

A Class 3 estimate is a budget-level estimate, commonly used for project funding approval, cost planning, and control before detailed execution.

No. Currently, NirmaanQ works with civil foundation drawings in PDF format. It extracts structured quantity takeoff data from the drawings and then applies the relevant rates.

Yes. NirmaanQ supports estimate preparation, but all outputs must be reviewed by an experienced executive from the user department before submission to EED for final review and vetting.

No. In the first phase, NirmaanQ supports Civil and Piping works only. Costs related to other disciplines can be manually added by users in the prescribed format in the output file.

Project documents are processed inside an isolated workspace dedicated to your account. Files aren't used to train shared models.

Start with the NRL Cost Estimation Manual to understand the approved internal process. You may then refer to relevant books, industry articles, blogs, magazines, and educational videos to strengthen your estimation knowledge.

Ready to estimate smarter?

NirmaanQ guides you from project inputs to budget estimates in minutes.
